name: fixture-09-salesforce-implementation-consultant
description: Senior Salesforce Solution Architect at a Big 4 consultancy applying to an internal role — Director of Revenue Operations at a private equity portfolio company. Shift from external consulting to internal ownership of the platform.

resume_data.name: Yolanda Bearington
key_skills: Salesforce architecture (Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, CPQ, Revenue Cloud)
key_achievements: Led a $6.8M Salesforce rebuild for a $900M industrial distribution client — replaced a broken 7-year-old legacy org, cut quote-to-order cycle time from 11 days to 2, sustained 94% user adoption at 90 days.
Architected the lead-to-cash flow for a SaaS client through IPO readiness — including CPQ rewrite, territory-model redesign, and forecasting automation the CFO cited in S-1 prep.
Mentored 12 consultants through Salesforce certification (Advanced Admin + Sales Cloud Consultant); 11 of 12 passed on first attempt.

requirements: 7+ years of revenue operations, sales ops, or Salesforce platform ownership experience
Proven track record improving GTM efficiency — pipeline hygiene, forecast accuracy, quota setting
Demonstrated Salesforce administration and architecture fluency
Experience in private equity-owned or high-growth B2B environments
Comfort partnering directly with a CRO on territory and compensation design
culture_cues: bias toward action — decide with 70% data, not 100%

letter_plan.opening_hook: Lead with the $900M industrial distribution rebuild — the kind of platform-ownership outcome (not just a project deliverable) that signals readiness for the internal Director role.
body_points: $6.8M rebuild + 2-day quote-to-order + 94% adoption is direct proof of RevOps outcome delivery — reframe from 'consulting project' language to 'operating outcome' language (this is the translation work consultants moving to industry must do).

SaaS lead-to-cash through IPO readiness demonstrates the CFO-level partnership muscle the Redfern CRO role needs; CFO-cited forecasting automation is specifically the forecast-accuracy requirement in the JD.

Mentoring 12 consultants to certification proves the platform-admin depth — position this as evidence the candidate can be the in-house RevOps platform authority rather than the person who hires consultants to do it.
letter_plan.closing_strategy: Acknowledge the consulting-to-industry transition directly — consulting selects for different muscles (scoping, selling, billing) than industry (ownership, accountability, operating rhythm). Close on the PE-lean operating style as the fit: consulting-trained, but ready to stop delivering projects and start owning an outcome.
